title: Mulblatt
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Mulblatts''' were a kind of creature whose [[Larva/Legends|larvae]] was served to [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], as a delicacy, in [[fregon-blood sauce]].

{{Creature-stub}}

*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''
